overallAssessment: The firm demonstrates generally good compliance with minor gaps in FICA CDD documentation and POPIA processing activity registration. Trust accounting and prescription tracking are well-managed. Immediate attention is required for 2 critically overdue CDD verifications.

findings.title: Critically overdue CDD verification for high-value client
findings.description: Client 'Ngubane Holdings (Pty) Ltd' has not undergone CDD verification renewal in over 90 days past the due date. The client has active matters with trust funds held.
findings.regulatoryBasis: FICA s21B — Ongoing CDD monitoring obligation
findings.remediation: Immediately initiate enhanced CDD review for this client. Request updated CIPC documents, proof of address, and beneficial ownership declaration. Escalate to MLRO if client is unresponsive within 7 days.

findings.title: Missing beneficial ownership declaration
findings.description: Client 'Moyo Investments' lacks a beneficial ownership declaration as required for legal persons. CDD file is incomplete.
findings.regulatoryBasis: FICA s21A — Enhanced CDD for legal persons
findings.remediation: Request beneficial ownership declaration from client within 14 days. If not provided, consider filing a s29 report and restricting the business relationship.

findings.title: Unregistered processing activities
findings.description: 2 processing activities related to client marketing communications have not been registered in the firm's PAIA/POPIA manual.
findings.remediation: Register the 2 outstanding processing activities in the PAIA manual. Document the lawful basis for processing, data categories, and retention periods.

findings.title: CDD documentation approaching renewal date
findings.description: 3 clients have CDD documentation expiring within the next 30 days. Proactive renewal is recommended.
findings.remediation: Schedule CDD renewal reviews for the 3 approaching clients. Send renewal reminders and prepare updated verification checklists.

recommendations.recommendation: Complete CDD verification for Ngubane Holdings immediately and escalate to MLRO
Implement automated CDD expiry alerting to prevent future overdue situations
